Question: Determine whether you would use linear, square, or cubic measure for each item. ⓐ amount of paint in a can ⓑ height of a tree ⓒ floor of your bedroom ⓓ diameter of bike wheel ⓔ size of a piece of sod ⓕ amount of water in a swimming pool
Answer: ⓐ cubic ⓑ linear ⓒ square ⓓ linear ⓔ square ⓕ cubic

Question: Determine whether you would use linear, square, or cubic measure for each item. ⓐ volume of a packing box ⓑ size of patio ⓒ amount of medicine in a syringe ⓓ length of a piece of yarn ⓔ size of housing lot ⓕ height of a flagpole
Answer: ⓐ cubic ⓑ square ⓒ cubic ⓓ linear ⓔ square ⓕ linear
